name: Project Detail View
summary: Modal dialog for viewing detailed project information including metadata, specs, and status
goals: Display comprehensive project details in a modal overlay
Show project metadata, associated specs, and current status

specDetail.description: A modal component that opens when a user clicks on a project card or row. Displays full project details including name, path, description, creation date, last modified date, spec count, and status indicators.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the project to display

parameters.name: onClose
parameters.description: Callback invoked when the modal is closed

constraints: Modal must trap focus when open for accessibility
Must close on Escape key press
Content must be scrollable when project details exceed viewport height

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project exists with full metadata
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user clicks on the project card
acceptanceCriteria.then: a modal opens displaying all project details including name, path, status, and timestamps

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
